div.head: Abkürzungen der wichtigsten Autorennamen.
div.ab:
Ach. = Acharius. Hook. = Hooker.
Ait. = Aiton. Jacq. = Jacquin.
All. = Allioni. Kit. = Kitaibel.
Amor. = Amoreux. Kregl. = Kreglinger.
Bertol. = Bertoloni. Labill. = Labillardière.
Bibr. = Bibron. Lam. = Lamarck.
Biv. = Bivona-Bernardi. Lath. = Latham.
Blum. = Blumenbach. Latr. = Latreille.
Bonap. = Bonaparte. Laur. = Laurenti.
Briss. = Brisson. Licht. = Lichtenstein.
Cl. = Claus. Lour. = Loureiro.
Crntz. = Crantz. Matth. = Matthioli.
Curt. = Curtis. Merr. = Merrem.
Cuv. = Cuvier. Mill. = Miller.
C. V. = Cuvier et Valenciennes. Pall. = Pallas.
D. C. = De Candolle. Pers. = Persoon.
Desf. = Desfontaines. Poir. = Poiret.
Desv. = Desvaux. R. Br. = Robert Brown.
Dum. = Duméril. Rchb. = Reichenbach, L.
Ehrbg. = Ehrenberg. Retz. = Retzius.
Fabr. = Fabricius, Joh. Chr. Rösel = Rösel von Rosenhof.
Fisch. = Fischer. Sch. = Schäffer.
Flem. = Fleming. Schreb. = Schreber.
Forsk. = Forskal. Scop. = Scopoli.
Gärtn. = Gärtner. Sibth. = Sibthorp.
Gaud. = Gaudin. Sm. = Smith.
Geoffr. = Geoffroy St. Hilaire. Spr. = Sprengel.
Haesk. = Haeskel. Sw. = Swartz.
Hauskn. = Hausknecht. Vaill. = Vaillant.
Hoffm. = Hoffmann. Vill. = Villars.
